action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh with empty workspace. Need to first explore the environment by creating a quick test script to understand observation/action spaces and basic functionality. This will inform my approach selection (heuristic vs RL). Analysis: The literature shows heuristic approaches can outperform RL on this task due to limited compute budget. Decision: Write a minimal test script to validate environment setup and observe the metrics.
